text.title: User Interviews Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: onboarding study with first-time buyer segment, 5 quotes feeding 3 insight statements.

example.title: Research questions
example.p: 1) What blocks completion? 2) Where do users hesitate? 3) What language do users use? 4) What expectations carry over from competitors? 5) Where do users seek help?

example.title: Guide (open + past-behaviour)
example.p: "Walk me through the last time you tried to onboard a new app." "What were you trying to accomplish?" "Tell me what you remembered most." Reviewed for neutrality; flagged "Would you click here?" → rewritten.

example.title: Insight + evidence
example.p: Statement: "First-time buyers expect a single-screen review before final confirmation." Evidence: P3 ("I wanted one place to see everything before I press the button"), P5 ("I scrolled back because I was not sure what I just agreed to").
